implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Footer added to src/app/page.tsx with current year and 'BrewBoard' copyright text, satisfying both acceptance criteria with a minimal, targeted change. Implementation log file is a stub but spec said no documentation — minor demerit.

requirements.notes: Both acceptance criteria met: footer at bottom of page, contains current year + 'BrewBoard'. Uses new Date().getFullYear() so year is always current.

correctness.notes: Valid JSX, proper semantic <footer> element, Tailwind classes are conventional. No type or integration issues.

minimality.notes: 3-line change to page.tsx is exactly right. Created an empty implementation log stub which arguably violates 'Do NOT add documentation' from spec, but it's a workflow artifact rather than feature docs.

code_quality.notes: Clean, readable, semantic <footer> tag, Tailwind classes match likely existing style (mt-8, text-stone-500). No naming or structure issues.

risk.notes: Semantic footer element is good for a11y. No regressions introduced. Minor: text-stone-500 contrast on light background may be borderline for WCAG AA but acceptable for footer text.
